heading: GENERAL PROVISIONS
label: III GENERAL PROVISIONS
notes: CodificationSubchapter is comprised of the portions of title VII of , as amended, that had not previously been repealed when title VII was editorially reclassified as this subchapter.act Sept. 8, 1950, ch. 932

children.heading: Investigations; records; reports; subpoenas; right to counsel
Jurisdiction of courts; injunctions; venue; process; effect of termination of provisions

Authorization of appropriations; availability of funds

Enhanced intelligence community support to secure United States biological data
